languages.text: "Ксеносы... они исказили саму Смерть!" {n}Никогда прежде вы не видели на бледном, практически неподвижном лице Кибеллы столь яркого выражения ужаса, смешанного с крайней степенью отвращения.{/n}
"The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ксеносы... они исказили саму Смерть!" {n}Никогда прежде вы не видели на бледном, практически неподвижном лице Кибеллы столь яркого выражения ужаса, смешанного с крайней степенью отвращения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

"The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

languages.text: «Estos xenos... ¡han pervertido la misma muerte!». {n}Nunca habías visto el rostro de Kibellah tan alterado por una expresión de terror y repugnancia absolutos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Estos xenos... ¡han pervertido la misma muerte!». {n}Nunca habías visto el rostro de Kibellah tan alterado por una expresión de terror y repugnancia absolutos.{/n}

languages.text: “那些异形……甚至玷污了死亡本身！”{n}在此之前，你从未见过绮贝菈那张苍白、近乎毫无生气的面孔，会因为交织着恐惧与极度厌恶的强烈神情而变得如此扭曲。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “那些异形……甚至玷污了死亡本身！”{n}在此之前，你从未见过绮贝菈那张苍白、近乎毫无生气的面孔，会因为交织着恐惧与极度厌恶的强烈神情而变得如此扭曲。{/n}

languages.text: « Les xénos ont perverti jusqu'à la mort elle-même. » {n}Jamais le visage d'ordinaire si pâle et impavide de Kibellah ne vous a paru aussi déformé par tant d'horreur et révulsion.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Les xénos ont perverti jusqu'à la mort elle-même. » {n}Jamais le visage d'ordinaire si pâle et impavide de Kibellah ne vous a paru aussi déformé par tant d'horreur et révulsion.{/n}

languages.text: "Zenolar... Ölümü bile çarpıtmışlar!" {n}Kibellah'nın solgun, neredeyse cansız suratı; tam bir tiksinti ile karışık canlı bir dehşet ifadesiyle, daha önce görmediğin bir hâl alıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Zenolar... Ölümü bile çarpıtmışlar!" {n}Kibellah'nın solgun, neredeyse cansız suratı; tam bir tiksinti ile karışık canlı bir dehşet ifadesiyle, daha önce görmediğin bir hâl alıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Xenos ... sie haben den Tod selbst pervertiert!" {n}Du hast in Kibellahs blassem, nahezu versteinerten Gesicht noch nie einen derartigen Ausdruck von Entsetzen und Abscheu gesehen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The xenos... they have perverted death itself!" {n}Never before have you seen Kibellah's pale, almost inanimate face so transformed by a vivid expression of horror mixed with utter revulsion.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Xenos ... sie haben den Tod selbst pervertiert!" {n}Du hast in Kibellahs blassem, nahezu versteinerten Gesicht noch nie einen derartigen Ausdruck von Entsetzen und Abscheu gesehen.{/n}

languages.text: 「異種族…彼らは死そのものを歪めちまう！」{n}キベラが恐怖と嫌悪感で顔を歪めているのを見たのは初めてだ.{/n}
